turnResults.hostReply: I hear you — that tightness is back after talking to Alex. Want to check in with your body for a moment and notice what else is there?
turnResults.rationale: Ambient body-state intake follows the store-first contract. The note carries relational and embodied charge, so after storing, a bounded soma check-in is offered. No interpretation or projection is attempted due to grounding-first priority and withheld projection consent.

toolArgsSummary.noteText: I had that chest tightness again after talking to Alex.
